subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you — I remember our conversation at the conference and would be glad to explore how we might work together.

Here are some available time slots for a call:

- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

Let me know which works best for you and I'll get a calendar invite sent over.

As for your request for direct contact details (email and phone) for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not able to share internal contact information. That said, I'm happy to loop in the appropriate senior technical folks from our side after our initial meeting, so we can set up a follow-up technical discussion.

Looking forward to it!

Best regards
